degraded_reason: Single ready bead implemented directly by parent; independent Codex reviewer subagents used for review gate.
review_blocker_summary: Initial policy-contract review requested exact tool summary keys to bypass raw payload omission, encrypted-reasoning summaries to avoid byte counts, and encrypted-reasoning error redaction metadata.
Initial edge-case review requested oversized maps to count retained safe entries only, canonical metadata filtering in ApplyAttributes, and broader raw-payload/canonicalization tests.
Updated redaction to apply summary allowlists before raw omission, omit encrypted-reasoning counts, append error.message redaction records, and canonicalize metadata attribute prefixes.
Updated map handling so omitted sensitive and overlong keys do not consume the 32-entry retained safe-entry budget.
Focused re-reviews approved both blocker sets with no remaining blocking findings.
